fa-down-from-dotted-line.appearanceId: downward-pointing arrow with shaft descending from a horizontal dotted line above; solid arrowhead pointing down below a dashed baseline
fa-down-from-dotted-line.functionalityId: moves or pulls content below a dotted boundary line; extracts an element downward from a dashed threshold
fa-down-from-dotted-line.intentId: place content beneath a dotted divider; bring an item down from a dashed boundary

fa-down-from-line.appearanceId: downward-pointing arrow with shaft descending from a solid horizontal line above; solid arrowhead pointing down below a solid baseline
fa-down-from-line.functionalityId: moves or pulls content below a solid boundary line; extracts an element downward from a defined threshold
fa-down-from-line.intentId: place content beneath a solid divider; bring an item down from a fixed line

fa-down-left.appearanceId: diagonal arrow pointing toward the lower-left corner; angled shaft with arrowhead aimed down and to the left
fa-down-left.functionalityId: navigates or moves content diagonally toward the lower-left; redirects an element in a down-left direction
fa-down-left.intentId: move something to the lower-left position; navigate diagonally downward and leftward

fa-down-long.appearanceId: long downward-pointing arrow with an elongated vertical shaft; solid arrowhead at the bottom of a tall stem
fa-down-long.functionalityId: scrolls or moves content far downward; navigates to a lower position with extended travel
fa-down-long.intentId: reach content far below the current view; move an element a significant distance downward

fa-down-right.appearanceId: diagonal arrow pointing toward the lower-right corner; angled shaft with arrowhead aimed down and to the right
fa-down-right.functionalityId: navigates or moves content diagonally toward the lower-right; redirects an element in a down-right direction
fa-down-right.intentId: move something to the lower-right position; navigate diagonally downward and rightward

fa-down-to-bracket.appearanceId: downward-pointing arrow with shaft ending at a horizontal bracket or tray shape below; arrowhead pointing into an open-top bracket
fa-down-to-bracket.functionalityId: downloads or drops content into a receiving bracket or slot; moves an item down into a designated container
fa-down-to-bracket.intentId: save or deposit content into a target slot below; download a file into a defined location

fa-down-to-dotted-line.appearanceId: downward-pointing arrow with shaft terminating at a horizontal dotted line below; solid arrowhead pointing down to a dashed floor
fa-down-to-dotted-line.functionalityId: moves or inserts content down to a dotted boundary; snaps an element downward to a dashed threshold
fa-down-to-dotted-line.intentId: align content to a dotted lower boundary; bring an item down to a dashed limit

fa-down-to-line.appearanceId: downward-pointing arrow with shaft terminating at a solid horizontal line below; solid arrowhead pointing down to a solid floor
fa-down-to-line.functionalityId: moves or snaps content down to a solid boundary line; collapses an element to a lower fixed position
fa-down-to-line.intentId: align content to a solid lower boundary; bring an item down to a fixed limit

fa-download.appearanceId: downward-pointing arrow above a horizontal tray or shelf line; arrow shaft descending toward an underline base
fa-download.functionalityId: downloads a file or resource to the local device; saves remote content to the user's storage
fa-download.intentId: save a file from the internet to local storage; retrieve and store a resource locally

fa-dragon.appearanceId: side-profile dragon silhouette with wings, tail, and open jaw; scaled reptilian creature in a rearing or flying pose
fa-dragon.functionalityId: represents a dragon character or fantasy creature element; tags content with a mythical beast category
fa-dragon.intentId: indicate fantasy or mythical creature content; select or identify a dragon-themed element

fa-draw-circle.appearanceId: circular ring or loop shape drawn with a single continuous stroke; round outline path suggesting a hand-drawn circle
fa-draw-circle.functionalityId: activates a circle drawing tool; creates a circular shape on a canvas
fa-draw-circle.intentId: draw or add a circle to a design; use the circular shape drawing mode

fa-draw-polygon.appearanceId: multi-sided polygon outline with connecting vertices and straight edges; irregular closed shape with corner anchor points
fa-draw-polygon.functionalityId: activates a polygon or freeform shape drawing tool; creates a custom multi-point closed shape on a canvas
fa-draw-polygon.intentId: draw a custom polygon on a design surface; define a multi-sided shape by placing vertices

fa-draw-square.appearanceId: square outline drawn with a single continuous stroke; four equal sides forming a right-angled closed path
fa-draw-square.functionalityId: activates a square or rectangle drawing tool; creates a square shape on a canvas
fa-draw-square.intentId: draw or add a square to a design; use the rectangular shape drawing mode

fa-dreidel.appearanceId: spinning top toy with a pointed bottom, wide body, and small handle at the top; four-sided top with Hebrew letter markings
fa-dreidel.functionalityId: represents a Hanukkah dreidel game piece; tags content with a Jewish holiday symbol
fa-dreidel.intentId: indicate Hanukkah or Jewish cultural content; select a dreidel or holiday-themed element

fa-drone.appearanceId: top-down view of a quadcopter drone body with four extending arms and propellers at each corner; symmetrical X-shaped frame
fa-drone.functionalityId: represents a drone device or aerial vehicle; tags content related to drone operations or delivery
fa-drone.intentId: indicate drone or unmanned aerial vehicle content; select or manage a drone-related feature

fa-drone-alt.appearanceId: side-profile or alternate view of a drone with visible body and rotor arms; slightly angled quadcopter silhouette
fa-drone-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternate drone view or variant drone type; tags content with an aerial drone identifier
fa-drone-alt.intentId: indicate drone content with an alternative perspective; select a different drone style or mode

fa-drum.appearanceId: cylindrical drum body with drumheads on top and bottom and tension rods along the side; percussion instrument viewed from a slight angle

fa-drum-steelpan.functionalityId: represents a steel drum or steel pan instrument; tags audio content with a Caribbean percussion category
fa-drum-steelpan.intentId: indicate steel pan or Caribbean music content; select a steel drum instrument element

fa-drumstick.functionalityId: represents a drumstick or percussion mallet; tags music content with a drumming instrument accessory
fa-drumstick.intentId: indicate drumming or percussion performance content; select a drumstick-related music element

fa-drumstick-bite.appearanceId: chicken or turkey drumstick with a bite taken out of the meat end; bone visible with partially eaten flesh silhouette
fa-drumstick-bite.functionalityId: represents a food drumstick or partially eaten poultry leg; tags content with a cooked meat or meal category

fa-dryer.appearanceId: front-loading clothes dryer appliance with a circular door porthole and control panel; rectangular laundry machine body

fa-dryer.intentId: indicate laundry or dryer appliance content; select or manage a clothes-drying function

fa-dryer-alt.appearanceId: alternate view of a clothes dryer with a circular porthole door and different panel layout; front-loading laundry machine variant
fa-dryer-alt.functionalityId: represents an alternate style clothes dryer; tags content with a laundry appliance variant identifier
fa-dryer-alt.intentId: indicate an alternate dryer model or style; select a different laundry appliance representation

fa-duck.appearanceId: side-profile duck silhouette with rounded body, short tail, flat bill, and small eye; waterfowl bird outline
fa-duck.functionalityId: represents a duck animal or waterfowl; tags content with a duck or nature category
fa-duck.intentId: indicate duck or waterfowl content; select a bird or nature-themed element

fa-dumbbell.appearanceId: horizontal dumbbell with two weight plates on each end connected by a short central bar; symmetrical barbell silhouette
fa-dumbbell.functionalityId: represents a dumbbell or weightlifting exercise; tags content with a fitness or gym activity category
fa-dumbbell.intentId: indicate strength training or fitness content; select a weightlifting or exercise-related element

fa-dumpster.appearanceId: rectangular waste dumpster container with open top and side handles; large trash bin body viewed from a slight angle
fa-dumpster.functionalityId: represents a dumpster or large waste container; tags content with a trash disposal or cleanup category
fa-dumpster.intentId: indicate waste disposal or bulk trash content; select a large trash container element

fa-dumpster-fire.functionalityId: represents a chaotic or disastrous situation using a burning dumpster metaphor; tags content as a crisis or major failure
fa-dumpster-fire.intentId: indicate a catastrophic failure or chaotic situation; signal that something has gone severely wrong

fa-dungeon.appearanceId: arched stone doorway or castle gate with a portcullis grating; medieval dungeon entrance with vertical bars and arch frame

fa-dungeon.intentId: indicate a dungeon or castle environment in a game; navigate to or enter a dungeon-themed area

fa-e.appearanceId: single uppercase or lowercase letter E glyph; the fifth letter of the Latin alphabet
fa-e.functionalityId: inserts or labels content with the letter E; represents the character E in a text or category system
fa-e.intentId: represent the letter E in an alphabet or labeling context; identify an item starting with or categorized under E

fa-ear.appearanceId: side-profile human ear silhouette with outer helix curve, antihelix, and earlobe; anatomical ear outline
fa-ear.functionalityId: represents listening or audio input functionality; indicates a hearing or audio-related control

fa-ear-muffs.appearanceId: pair of circular ear cup pads connected by an overhead headband arc; noise-canceling or cold-weather ear protection silhouette

fa-ear-muffs.intentId: indicate ear protection or hearing safety equipment; select a noise reduction or cold-weather accessory

fa-earth.appearanceId: globe sphere with continent outlines and latitude or longitude grid lines; round world map with land mass silhouettes
fa-earth.functionalityId: represents the Earth or global scope; indicates a worldwide or geographic feature

fa-earth-oceania.appearanceId: globe sphere with Australia and Pacific island continent outlines prominently centered; round world map showing the Oceania hemisphere

fa-eclipse.appearanceId: circular disk with a smaller overlapping circle partially covering one side; solar or lunar eclipse silhouette showing partial occlusion
fa-eclipse.functionalityId: represents an eclipse event or dark mode toggle; indicates a celestial or light-blocking transition
fa-eclipse.intentId: indicate an eclipse event or toggle between light and dark states; represent a celestial occlusion moment

fa-eclipse-alt.appearanceId: circular disk with an overlapping crescent or alternate occlusion pattern; variant eclipse silhouette with different coverage geometry

fa-eclipse-alt.intentId: indicate an alternate eclipse configuration or dark mode variant; represent a different light-blocking state

fa-edit.appearanceId: pencil or pen angled diagonally over a document or square surface; writing instrument overlaying a page outline
fa-edit.functionalityId: opens an editing interface for a document or item; enables modification of existing content

fa-egg.appearanceId: oval egg shape with a slightly tapered top and rounded bottom; smooth elliptical shell silhouette
fa-egg.functionalityId: represents an egg or food ingredient; tags content with a cooking or ingredient category
fa-egg.intentId: indicate egg-related food or cooking content; select an egg as an ingredient or item

fa-egg-fried.appearanceId: fried egg with a round yolk centered on an irregular white spread; sunny-side-up egg silhouette on a flat surface
fa-egg-fried.functionalityId: represents a fried egg or cooked breakfast item; tags content with a prepared egg meal category
fa-egg-fried.intentId: indicate a cooked egg or breakfast food item; select a fried egg as a meal or menu element

fa-eggplant.appearanceId: elongated teardrop-shaped eggplant with a green stem and leafy calyx at the top; aubergine vegetable silhouette
fa-eggplant.functionalityId: represents an eggplant or aubergine vegetable; tags food content with a vegetable category
fa-eggplant.intentId: indicate eggplant or aubergine as a food or ingredient; select a vegetable item in a recipe or menu

fa-eject.appearanceId: upward-pointing triangle with a horizontal bar directly below it; eject symbol with arrowhead above a line
fa-eject.functionalityId: ejects a disk, tray, or removable media from a device; removes inserted media from its slot
fa-eject.intentId: safely remove or eject a disc or storage device; release inserted media from a drive or player

fa-elephant.appearanceId: side-profile elephant silhouette with large ear flap, long curved trunk, and rounded body; four-legged pachyderm outline
fa-elephant.functionalityId: represents an elephant animal or large mammal; tags content with a wildlife or zoo animal category
fa-elephant.intentId: indicate elephant or safari wildlife content; select an animal-themed element

fa-elevator.appearanceId: rectangular elevator car outline with up and down arrows or a person figure inside; vertical transport cabin silhouette
fa-elevator.functionalityId: represents an elevator or vertical transport function; navigates between floors or levels in a building interface
fa-elevator.intentId: indicate elevator access or floor navigation; move between levels in a building or layered interface

fa-ellipsis.appearanceId: three small equally spaced dots arranged horizontally in a row; horizontal ellipsis punctuation mark
fa-ellipsis.functionalityId: opens an overflow or more-options menu; reveals additional actions or settings not shown in the main interface
fa-ellipsis.intentId: access hidden or additional options for an item; expand a menu to see more available actions

fa-ellipsis-h-alt.appearanceId: three small equally spaced dots arranged horizontally with a subtle style variation; alternate horizontal three-dot ellipsis
fa-ellipsis-h-alt.functionalityId: opens an alternate overflow or more-options menu; reveals additional actions in a secondary style

fa-ellipsis-v.appearanceId: three small equally spaced dots arranged vertically in a column; vertical ellipsis or kebab menu indicator
fa-ellipsis-v.functionalityId: opens a vertical overflow or contextual options menu; reveals additional item-level actions in a vertical menu
